name: n8n-reysa-mcp
description: Plugin-first Codex distribution for operating n8n through the local n8n_rest MCP wrapper and bundled n8n-ops skill.

interface.shortDescription: Operate n8n with bundled skill + MCP
interface.longDescription: Local plugin that bundles the n8n-ops skill with the n8n_rest stdio MCP wrapper so Codex runtimes can discover one supported path for n8n operations.
defaultPrompt: Use the bundled n8n-ops skill with the plugin-exposed n8n_rest MCP for n8n operations
